trees.name: Scale AM Optimisation
trees.desired_outcome: Free AMs from manual work so they can focus on relationships and growth
trees.key_result: Remove 10 hrs/month of manual AM work per venue

branches.name: Bulk deal tooling
branches.description: AMs managing deals across venues manually

branches.name: Onboarding automation
branches.description: Manual steps in new venue onboarding AMs currently own
branches.top_opportunity: OPP-001: Automate venue data flow from sign-up to Hub to HubSpot (~$200k+/yr FTE saving)

branches.name: Customer flagging
branches.description: AMs manually identifying at-risk or opportunity venues
branches.top_opportunity: IAO venues churn 2x dine-in rate — segment at risk, no flagging mechanism in place

branches.name: Opportunity surfaces
branches.description: AMs not knowing which venues to prioritise or act on
branches.top_opportunity: Single venue dashboard (deal score + engagement + debt + last AM contact)

branches.name: Deal Brain recommendations
branches.description: AMs manually configuring deals that could be system-recommended

branches.name: Early warning system
branches.description: AMs reacting to churn after signals were already visible
branches.delivery_coverage: Partial — Jeroen opening hours agent (600-700 venues); Billy in early use
branches.top_opportunity: IAO churn segment identification + proactive AM alert before 14-day silence threshold

trees.name: Drive Deal Performance Through System-Led Actions
trees.desired_outcome: Increase venue revenue via scalable system-driven optimisation in Partner Portal
trees.key_result: Increase % of venues actively engaging in revenue-driving actions within Partner Portal

branches.name: NCI activation
branches.description: Venues not activating or understanding New Customer Incentive

branches.name: Smarter defaults
branches.description: Venues launching with suboptimal deal settings
branches.top_opportunity: Group sign-up: 50 venues launching with no group-level default deal setting

branches.name: Marketing packs
branches.description: Venues unaware of or not engaging with marketing tools

branches.name: Deal upgrade prompts
branches.description: Venues on underperforming deals with no system nudge to adjust

branches.name: Partner Portal engagement
branches.top_opportunity: Bookings needs settlement integration and AM training before Partner Portal push

cross_tree_signals.signal: AI tool sprawl: Sam Billy (507 Claude instances/day), Jeroen 3 agents, Crilly all running independently with no shared governance
cross_tree_signals.recommended_action: Escalate to leadership. Convene Adam, Jeroen, Sam, Allen, Brian before end of April.

cross_tree_signals.signal: EatClub Bookings launched without settlement, AM training, or PM ownership — AMs struggling to sell vs OpenTable
cross_tree_signals.recommended_action: Pause aggressive selling target. Build settlement integration and run AM training session first.

cross_tree_signals.signal: Metrics Hub broken: dashboards pulling from different sources, no A/B testing framework
cross_tree_signals.recommended_action: Watch — dependency on Databricks going live mid-April (Kaushal Patel)

out_of_okr_signals.signal: Group sign-up: no enterprise onboarding infrastructure — Sam Benjamin #1 Q2 priority, third crack at it
out_of_okr_signals.notes: Strong commercial priority. Warrants its own branch or tree addition given Q2 focus.

out_of_okr_signals.signal: City rollout process: Sam messaged at 5:30am Leeds/Cardiff/Liverpool going tomorrow with no regression checklist
out_of_okr_signals.notes: Engineering process gap creating reliability risk.
